step_1_scanned_metadata.narrative_summary: Philip Osborne recalled under hypnosis an encounter in the Smokey Mountains in 1949-50. While looking for his brother's coat at night, he remembered a metallic disc with a luminous geodesic dome landing. He felt drawn into the ship, where he lay in a hospital-like room. An arm-like device made an incision in his leg, leaving a scar, and an eye-like device appeared above him, after which he seemed to fly through space. He did not recall seeing any beings or what happened to his family.

encounter_events.source_citation: he recalled a Metallic disc with a luMinous geodesic doMe (or a sphere)
encounter_events.ai_justification: A metallic disc with a luminous geodesic dome matches the domed disk / Saturn shape motif.
Light from the craft irritated the witness's eyes, matching eye troubles (burn, vision impaired, sensitive to light).

encounter_events.source_citation: This object landed on vertical supports
encounter_events.ai_justification: Vertical supports on which the craft landed correspond to landing gear.
A wedge-like section opening on the craft corresponds to a door opening.

encounter_events.source_citation: He felt hiMself drawn into the ship, perhaps by flotation or carried on a stretcher
encounter_events.ai_justification: Being drawn into the ship by flotation matches levitation / drawing force.

encounter_events.source_citation: found hiMself lying down in a hospital-like rooM
encounter_events.ai_justification: Lying down in a hospital-like room implies lying on an examining table or couch.
A hospital-like room where examination occurs corresponds to the examination room motif.
Light surrounding the witness without a specific source matches bright and uniform lighting.

encounter_events.source_citation: His initial anxiety gave way to relaxation
encounter_events.ai_justification: Anxiety giving way to relaxation during the examination matches the pacification effect.

encounter_events.source_citation: an arMlike device Made an incision in his leg, taking out soMething or reMoving a saMple
encounter_events.ai_justification: An arm-like device making an incision in the witness's leg matches beings making an incision for unknown purpose.
A scar remaining from the incision matches the linear or circular scar aftereffect.

encounter_events.source_citation: An eye (?) like device (or intent organic eye) appeared above hiM
encounter_events.ai_justification: An eye-like device appearing above the witness matches the eyelike device descending from ceiling and scanning the witness.

encounter_events.source_citation: he seeMed to fly through space and see stars
encounter_events.ai_justification: Seeming to fly through space while lying on a table suggests an out-of-body experience or visionary state.

encounter_events.source_citation: nor did he see any beings
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness did not see any beings, yet procedures were performed on him, implying beings were present but unseen.

encounter_events.source_citation: He did not recall what happened to the rest of his faMily
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness's inability to recall what happened to his family members during the event implies differential memory in a multiple-witness scenario.
